creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to George Mitchell from comment #282)

As for what I was trying to do . . .

Turns out that the addresses of the entries in the found_modules
list are not stable in detail from boot to boot. So I can not use
the successful-boot case to figure out where to expect to find the
last entries might be at in the failing case (nodes after the
corrupted pointer is involved).
